texto: Garahel always used to say that heroism was just another word for horror, and maybe a worse one. A hero always feels that he has to do what's right. Sometimes that leads to tormenting himself with doubt long after the deed is done.
explicacao: Citação de Liane Merciel sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Garahel always used to say that heroism was just another word for horror, and maybe a worse one. …” articula lideranca, heroes, war em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como war.
